features: A family favourite for over 130 years Wright’s Traditional Soap is known and loved for cleansing skin with an iconic coal tar fragrance
It is specially formulated for everyday skin cleansing
Contains an active ingredient with natural antibacterial properties
description: Product Description First launched in 1860, this iconic traditional bar soap has been a family favourite for over 130 years. Known and loved for its everyday skin cleansing, it contains an active ingredient with natural antibacterial properties. With its traditional coal tar fragrance, it is suitable for all skin types and everyday use. Ingredients Sodium Tallowate, Sodium Cocoate, Aqua, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Cocamide DEA, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Gylcerin, Melaeuca Alternifolia Oil, Testrasodium EDTA, Eugenol, d-Limonene, Etidronic Acid, Amyl Cinnamal, Cinnamal, Coumarin, CI 11680, CI 15510 Safety Warning For external use only. Manufacturer Contact Information Lomamead UK Ltd, Wiltshire, BA14 0XB. See more
